Fylox Card

Fylox Card

Tu Pi en
tu billetera.
Física.

La primera tarjeta del mundo que convierte tus Pi en poder de compra real. Chip EMV, NFC, y aceptación global. Úsala en 210 países, en cualquier comercio, sin convertir nada de antemano.

💳
Chip EMV + NFC

Pagos físicos y sin contacto en cualquier terminal del mundo.

🌍
210 países

Aceptada globalmente, online y offline.

⚡
Sin conversión previa

Tu Pi se convierte en el momento exacto del pago. Sin pasos extra.

🔒
KYC nativo de Pi

Tu identidad ya verificada en Pi Network. Sin trámites adicionales.

Quiero mi tarjeta →

What Fylox does

Pi for real life.
Every day. Everywhere.

No bank account required. Works in 200 countries.

🏪

Pay at Merchants

Scan a QR and pay with Pi. The merchant receives local currency instantly. Zero friction. Zero conversion.

💳

Fylox Card

A real card linked to your Pi wallet. Use it anywhere — online and offline — in 210 countries.

💡

Pay Bills with Pi

Electricity, gas, internet, taxes — all paid directly in Pi. No bank transfer needed.

🚌

Transit Cards

Load SUBE, Beep, TuLlave, Oyster and 50+ transit systems worldwide with Pi in seconds.

📱

Mobile Top-Ups

Top up any mobile number in 200+ countries across every major carrier. Instantly.

🌍

No Bank Required

Built for the unbanked. If you have a Pi wallet and a phone, Fylox works for you — anywhere on Earth.

Fylox Protocol

The infrastructure layer

The infrastructure that
gives Pi real value.

Four layers that generate external revenue and use it to purchase Pi — creating structural demand that makes Pi's value real and sustainable.

01
ORACLE

Physical World Verification

Enterprises pay to verify real-world events using Pioneers as human sensors. Insurance, logistics, NGOs — $80B market.

02
NEXUS

Universal Portable Reputation

A universal reputation score owned by each Pioneer — not by any platform. Portable across every app and service.

03
AGORA

Democratic AI Governance

AI companies pay Pioneers to democratically govern their models. Human oversight at scale — powered by Pi.

04
MARKETPLACE

Integration Marketplace

Local developers connect their country's services and earn Pi commissions — scaling to 200 countries without a central team.

Three-country pilot

Global from Day 1.

Launching simultaneously in three countries chosen for Pioneer density, financial inclusion opportunity, and local payment complexity.

🇦🇷 Argentina
🇳🇬 Nigeria
🇵🇭 Philippines
